nasb.text: Of Kohath was the family of the Amramites and the family of the Izharites and the family of the Hebronites and the family of the Uzzielites; these were the families of the Kohathites.

esv.text: To Kohath belonged the clan of the Amramites and the clan of the Izharites and the clan of the Hebronites and the clan of the Uzzielites; these are the clans of the Kohathites.

cnv.text: 屬哥轄的，有暗蘭家族、以斯哈家族、希伯倫家族和烏薛家族；這是哥轄人的家族。

ccb.text: 哥辖宗族有暗兰家族、以斯哈家族、希伯仑家族和乌薛家族，
